rows.finalText: For "What is the next right step in my calling", the clearest pattern sits in Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. The sequence begins in Past with Letter (27), so written clarity improves confidence is already in play. Letter often points to the wording, terms, or explicit message that makes the path less vague and more livable in your calling. Cross (36) in Future suggests a serious theme calls for grounded reflection, once the middle-card pressure has been worked with directly. Here, Cross emphasizes the weight of calling, duty, and the difference between a meaningful burden and a draining one. Letter (27) with Clover (2) show what most shapes the question of calling: a blend of document and luck, asking you to document clearly and follow up while staying alert to assuming fortune will remain without effort.
